name: Minmetals Capital Company Limited
summary: Minmetals Capital Company Limited engages in the investment, finance, leasing, trusts, securities, futures, and insurance and other businesses in China. The company offers trust, investment fund, investment banking, wealth management, an others services. It also provides direct finance, after-sale, vendor, and operating leasing services; and a range of brokerage, fixed income, asset management, and securities brokerage and investment advisory services. In addition, the company offers derivatives integrated service platform and futures brokerage services; and commercial banking services. It operates 68 business outlets in Mianyang City. The company was formerly known as Kingray New Materials Science & Technology Co., Ltd and changed its name to Minmetals Capital Company Limited in March 2017. Minmetals Capital Company Limited was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Changsha, China.
